note: RSS news feeds for the daily news ingestion (B5). Tiers: T1 = official authoritative (MLB.com, ESPN's straight reporting), T2 = reliable creator (SBNation beats, trusted aggregators). Scopes: 'league' = MLB-wide, 'cardinals' = Cards-focused, 'nationals' = Nats-focused. Feeds with `enabled: false` are documented but not fetched (e.g. MASN — no public RSS endpoint located). Per-source errors are recorded in news-latest.json without failing the run.

sources.note: No public RSS endpoint located as of 2026-05-02. Documented placeholder. Re-enable when a feed URL is found.

caveats: MLB.com feed URL pattern not formally documented; the standard guess is `/feeds/news/rss.xml`. Per-source error handling means a wrong URL only suppresses that source — never blocks the whole run.
MLB Trade Rumors is rumors-tier by name, but its sourcing on trades and signings is well-corroborated. Tier T1 per kickoff.
Cardinals.com is an MLB.com sub-feed (official); listed T2 per kickoff so league-wide MLB.com can stay distinct as the headline T1 source.
